Crawl Results

  • Sources checked: Hetzner, RunPod, RackNerd, DigitalOcean
  • Deals written: 45 (no change from previous day)
  • Errors: None — all 4 providers returned successfully
  • Crawl log: data/crawl-log.json

Data Validation

  • Deal count: 45 (≥30 ✅)
  • Bundle count: 8 (≥5 ✅)
  • Pricing check: 29 monthly-priced, 3 free-tier (monthly=0), 3 annual-priced (domains), 3 per-GB (storage), 7 per-1M-tokens (AI). All deals have valid pricing. ✅
  • Bad entries: None ✅

Build Status

  • gatsby clean ✅
  • gatsby build --prefix-paths ✅ (58 pages)
  • rewrite-paths.sh ✅ (60 HTML files fixed, webpack publicPath /deals/ confirmed)

Deploy Status

  • container-build.sh completed ✅
  • Main site: 642 pages built
  • Deals site: 58 pages built
  • Deployed to GitHub Pages: f328af0b62 on gh-pages
  • Main site root index.html preserved (not overwritten by deals site) ✅

Live Verification

Check Result
https://solo.engineer/deals/ 200 ✅
https://solo.engineer/page-data/deals/page-data.json 200 ✅
Main site root ("Bobbie Intelligence") Present ✅

Issues

None. Clean run across all steps.
